case_title: BRIAN D. PASTORE VS. FAZILAT J KAZEMINEZHAD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASTORE, BRIAN D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAZEMINEZHAD, FAZILAT J. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO NAME PALM GROUP, LLC AS DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT PALM GROUP APPEARED AT TRIAL, WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTIFICATION OF TRIAL. DEFENDANT FAZILAT J. KAZEMINEZHAD DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF PASTORE, BRIAN D.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JAN-30-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAZEMINEZHAD, FAZILAT J.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,275.00 FILED BY PASTORE, BRIAN D. AS TO DEFENDANT KAZEMINEZHAD, FAZILAT J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO FAZILAT J. KAZEMINEZHAD BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-18-2009 AT 1:30PM.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT KAZEMINEZHAD, FAZILAT J. ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
